Class ScoreCalculator

java.lang.Object
fr.uge.cascadia.score.ScoreCalculator
public class ScoreCalculator extends Object
Manages score calculations for a specific player using Java Streams.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ScoreCalculator(Player player)
    Constructs a ScoreCalculator for the given player.

  • Constructor Details

    • ScoreCalculator

      public ScoreCalculator(Player player)
      Constructs a ScoreCalculator for the given player.
      Parameters:
      player - the player whose score will be calculated

  • Method Details

    • calculateTilesScore

      public Map<Habitat,Integer> calculateTilesScore()
      Calculates the score for habitats.
      Returns:
      a map of habitats to their scores

    • calculateAnimalsScore

      public Map<Animal,Integer> calculateAnimalsScore(int choice, String card, FauneBag animals)
      Calculates the player's animal scores based on the chosen scoring method.
      Parameters:
      choice - the scoring method to use:
      • 1: Family scoring
      • 2: Intermediate scoring
      • 3: Scoring with a specific card
      card - the identifier of the scoring card (used when choice is 3)
      animals - the FauneBag containing all animals in the game
      Returns:
      a map of Animal to their respective scores
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if animals or card is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if choice is not 1, 2, or 3

    • calculateTotalScore

      public int calculateTotalScore(Map<Animal,Integer> animalScores, Map<Habitat,Integer> habitatScores, Map<Habitat,Integer> bonuses, int nb_tokens)
      Calculates the total score by summing animal and habitat scores.
      Parameters:
      animalScores - the animal scores map
      habitatScores - the habitat scores map
      Returns:
      the total score
